_readme: Approved render recipe (starcomb resolution: CLI > this file > GENERIC). Every knob is pinned because the look is approved.
approved: 2026-07-08 (user): corridor-free defaults at chroma_core k=4 — the neutral look won the k=0/2/4 ladder; the bright-star red halo is the Sigma-180-wide-open optical signature, left as-is by user verdict

notes.sep_engine: inpaint pinned with the approved look (rendered before the net default existed). The LMC is resolved extended structure — re-render under net is a candidate improvement, but it changes an approved render: declared delta + user's eyes first.
notes.chroma_core: k=4 over-neutralizes real H-alpha on this bright-colour target relative to set-03's noise-dominated colour; user chose the neutral look anyway on the ladder
